title: Player Stand
description: Customizable, player-shaped armor stands that support skins, armor and interactions.
body: # **![playerstandbanner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1073829/description_b24214a0-c496-43e8-a3af-821131070c37.png)** **Player Stand** is a Minecraft mod that adds a new item called **Player Stand** — an upgraded version of the armor stand that acts as a fully functional, player-shaped mannequin. Designed to blend seamlessly into both creative and survival gameplay, it offers a more immersive and customizable way to display armor, outfits, poses, and player skins. > 📌 Requires AnCore — a shared library used by Anchor Studios mods. Make sure it is installed for Player Stand to work correctly. *** ## **Overview** Unlike traditional armor stands, Player Stands use the full player model and support advanced features like armor rendering, custom skins, and animated poses. It's ideal for map makers, server owners, and builders looking for more lifelike, interactive displays. *** ## **Key Features** * 🎭 **Player Model Display:** Uses the full animated player model instead of a static armor stand. * 🛡️ **Armor Compatibility:** Can equip and visually display full sets of armor and items in both hands. * 🧍 **Unique Poses:** Shift + Right-Click to cycle through a variety of pre-defined poses like Heroic, Defensive, Floating, and more. * 🎨 **Custom Skins:** Bind your skin by right-clicking with an empty hand (or a non-equipable item) when the stand has no item to take. Skin binding is fully configurable. * ⚙️ **Configurable Interaction:** Toggle whether players can retexture an already-bound stand, choose interaction priorities, and more. * 🧱 **Survival & Creative Support:** Balanced and intuitive interactions work seamlessly in both gameplay modes. * ❤️ **Regenerates Over Time:** Player Stands slowly heal if left undamaged, mimicking a player-like behavior. *** ## **Requirements** * ✅ [AnCore Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancore) > ❗ This mod will **not function** without AnCore. *** ## **Learn More** * 🌐 [Official Website](https://www.anchorstudios.site/) * 📖 [Wiki & Setup Guide](https://www.anchorstudios.site/wiki/playerstand) * 📥 [Installation Instructions](https://www.anchorstudios.site/wiki/playerstand/download) *** ## **Community & Development** * 🧩 [Source Code / GitHub](https://github.com/Anchor-Studios/Player-Stand) * 💬 [Join Our Discord](https://discord.gg/RNG8Q5dFE3) *** **Player Stand** is developed and maintained by [**Anchor Studios**](https://modrinth.com/organization/anchorstudios), focused on quality-of-life features and creative tools that feel native to Minecraft.
